单双怎么倍投不怕长龙【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-238539367_62109807<br>vk.com/topic-238163227_62109816<br>vk.com/topic-238264951_62295770<br>vk.com/topic-238163212_61264775<br>vk.com/topic-238135598_61152312<br>vk.com/topic-238507320_61771698<br>vk.com/topic-238394877_62109830<br>vk.com/topic-238581005_60569979<br>vk.com/topic-238137582_61264754<br>vk.com/topic-238445856_61017218<br>vk.com/topic-238580520_61771702<br>vk.com/topic-238135070_61771717<br>vk.com/topic-238163252_61264800<br>vk.com/topic-238522422_61264809<br>vk.com/topic-238550546_61017240<br>vk.com/topic-238552411_62295807<br>vk.com/topic-238135101_62295804<br>vk.com/topic-238265037_62109861<br>vk.com/topic-238543369_61452130<br>vk.com/topic-238581078_61152368<br>vk.com/topic-238343946_61017263<br>vk.com/topic-238539764_60679939<br>vk.com/topic-238539304_60679940<br>vk.com/topic-238530773_60920195<br>vk.com/topic-238580497_62109880<br>vk.com/topic-238581371_62295884<br>vk.com/topic-238552414_60679968<br>vk.com/topic-238581400_61771815<br>vk.com/topic-238581192_61264885<br>vk.com/topic-238265094_60679980<br>vk.com/topic-238343792_61264899<br>vk.com/topic-237864365_60570075<br>vk.com/topic-238570067_62109906<br>vk.com/to
